error_signature: Client version 1.14.1 is incompatible with server version 1.16.0
title: Incompatible n8n client and server versions in Docker
symptom: Repeated errors in the logs indicate a version mismatch between the n8n client and server. The client version is 1.14.1 while the server version is 1.16.0.
not_this_if: Both client and server versions match
root_cause: The error occurs because the n8n client and server versions must match in major version and can only differ by one in minor version. In this case, the client version is outdated compared to the server version, leading to compatibility issues.
fix_steps: Update the Docker image in your docker-compose.yml to match the server version (1.16.0)
Ensure the client version is also updated to match the server version
Restart the Docker container to apply changes
agent_instruction: Update the Docker image to ensure the client and server versions match.
